content.en:
"What big chance?"

Ye Tian was a little curious, he stared at this black statue, he only felt that the material of this statue was relatively special, but he didn't find it useful.

The machine spirit pointed to the black statue and said, "Master, do you know what this is?"

"I don't know!" Ye Tian shook his head.

The machine spirit said excitedly: "This is the certificate of the Source God Pavilion, with this black statue, you can join the Source God Pavilion." "

"Yuanshen Pavilion, what kind of force is this?" Ye Tian hurriedly asked.

Ji Ling said: "Strictly speaking, the Source God Pavilion is not a force, but an idle organization or chamber of commerce, within the Source God Pavilion, the Supreme Beings can trade items with each other, issue quests, and purchase information. In the Source Sea, many times it is extremely difficult to find a treasure that suits you or is relatively rare, and there is even no way to buy it, but it can be bought in the Source God Pavilion, so many supreme beings want to join the Source God. However, the requirements for entering the Genshin Pavilion are very high, and in addition to being required by the Genshin Pavilion, you must obtain the Genshin Statue before you can join the Genshin Pavilion. "

"When the previous master was still alive, the Source God Pavilion invited the previous master, but the previous master was too arrogant and didn't want to join the Source God Pavilion, otherwise, if the master was blessed by the twelve ancestors of the Source God Pavilion in the end, I am afraid that he would not fall. "

The Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion?

Ye Tian continued to listen, and soon understood what the strength of the Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion was.

Half-step Eternal Realm!

The realm above the Supreme One is the Eternal Realm, but whether there is an Eternal Realm among the Source Gods, the machine spirit is not clear, but the half-step Eternal Realm that crosses the Ninefold Supreme exists, and there are still many such strong people.

The Void Origin Ancestor is a half-step Eternal Realm, but it is relatively weak in the Half-step Eternal Realm, while the Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion are the top existences in the Half-Step Eternal Realm, and the twelve ancestors are united, which is enough to deter countless forces in the Source Sea.

The Twelve Ancestors did not like fighting, but they liked to trade very much, so they established the Source God, but they were very demanding of those who joined.

It is conceivable that obtaining the statue of the Source God that joined the Source God Pavilion is simply a great opportunity.

Then, under the instruction of the machine spirit, Ye Tian began to refine the statue.

After a long time, Ye Tian succeeded in refining.

"Master, this statue is a testament, you can now use the statue to cross the Source God Void and enter the Source God Pavilion hidden in the depths of the void, so that you can trade with other Supreme Beings in the Source God Pavilion. The machine spirit said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he asked the replica body to carry a large amount of resources to the Source God Pavilion.

Airplanes!!!!!

The statue of the Source God wrapped Ye Tian, and instantly penetrated the infinite distance, directly coming to the Source God Pavilion.

This method of shuttling is more convenient than the Void Source Temple, but it cannot be used during battle, so the void ripples during battle, and it is impossible to successfully open the Origin God Statue.

Otherwise, the original God of Tea Sea Source would not have fallen.

......

Genjin Pavilion.

Ye Tian came in, and as soon as he entered here, he sensed dozens of supreme beings.

There won't be many members of the Source God Pavilion, and besides, it is impossible for these Supreme Beings to stay in the Source God Pavilion very often, so unless there is an assembly, the number of Supreme Beings here will not be very large.

"A new member has been detected, please register your profile!"

The voice of the Origin God Pavilion Instrument Spirit appeared in Ye Tian's mind.

Ye Tian immediately registered his membership in the Source God Pavilion according to the instructions of the Machine Spirit, and took the Endless Ancestor as his new name.

Immediately.

He began to wander around the Origin God Pavilion.

You can open a store in the Genjin Pavilion, the store is not a real storefront, and there is no one there, but it will mark what treasures are sold in the store, and if you are interested, you can communicate with the owner.

It's also an alternative trade.

Ye Tian also saw a lot of tasks in an area of the Source God Pavilion, most of them were trading tasks, such as someone collecting the original source liquid, etc., but almost all of these tasks were bartered.

Ye Tian saw that there were a lot of good things on the trading tasks, and they even helped him a lot.

By asking the machine spirit, Ye Tian knew some of the situation in the Source God Pavilion.

For example, the Origin God Pavilion would hold a large-scale trade fair every hundred great tribulations, and many supreme beings would prepare treasures to trade here.

And the time of the next big trade fair is after 23 catastrophes.

After Ye Tian prepared for 23 Great Tribulation Periods, he would enter the Source God Pavilion to trade, and only then could he trade good things.

In the 23rd Great Tribulation Era, Ye Tian collected a circle of resources in the Ancient Star Clan as the Ancient Star Clan's Xu Chen, preparing for the large-scale trade fair of the Source God Pavilion.

In the blink of an eye, 23 Great Tribulations have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian entered the Source God Pavilion again, and this time when he came, he saw a large number of supreme beings.

His realm of the Ninefold Supreme is simply very inconspicuous here, even the Ninefold Supreme is quite a few here, and there may even be a powerhouse of the half-step Eternal Realm.

There are many trading areas in the Genjin Pavilion, and any Supreme can try the shop for free to sell their items.

Ye Tian also got a shop and hung the things he didn't need on it, and he didn't need to barter them, he could buy them with eternal coins.

Eternal Coin is a kind of currency used in transactions between the supreme beings, this currency is not a simple currency, but a currency condensed from the origin of the eternal source combined with some special treasure materials.

According to the value of the eternal source, there are three types of eternal coins: inferior eternal coins, medium eternal coins, and superior eternal coins.

Ye Tian exchanged the things he didn't need for eternal coins, also for the convenience of future transactions.

Moreover, Ye Tian's price is very cheap, so many supreme people have entered Ye Tian's shop to buy, and he only leaves an avatar here to be in charge of the store, and the real body is looking for a suitable trading partner.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to find a trading partner.

The other party was a Triple Peak Supreme Being, who asked to trade the Primordial Source Liquid, and among the many treasures listed, there was one that Ye Tian needed.

"Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf!"

The Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf is similar to the effect of the Enlightenment Leaf, but it is suitable for the First and Double Supreme Beings, if you take the Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf, you can increase the chance of breaking through the bottleneck, after all, it can increase people's understanding and perception of the eternal rules to an unimaginable degree in an instant.

What's more, the Eternal Pine Leaf does not affect the root problem, and there is no sequelae of the original source liquid.

However, the Primordial Source Liquid could 100% help the First Supreme One break through to the Second Supreme One, but the Eternal Ancient Pine Leaf couldn't.

But Ye Tian couldn't look down on the original source liquid, but he looked at the eternal ancient pine leaves.

Immediately, he walked up to the Triple Supreme and asked for a deal with him.
